provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male with albinism in his 20s with very pale skin and white hair and light-sensitive eyes behind tinted goggles, wearing a charcoal Compact undersuit with a hood that he keeps up to protect from bright station lighting, the goggles are prescription and strapped securely, standard boots, he is a perfectly ordinary crew member who happens to need eye protection under standard ship lighting

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
